title: Bukkit Hidden Syntax Blocker
description:
An revision of the BukkitHiddenSyntaxBlocker plugin but with
a permission to make so you can use : commands if you have said permission.
body:
The plugins allows you to remove access to syntax from players (/minecraft:tp, /essentials:msg, ect), and removes it from the tab list allowing you to keep your plugins private, and reduce clutter!


Bypass Permission: **syntaxblocker.bypass**
Admin Permission: **syntaxblocker.admin**
